topbar.tagline: Built for keepers. Made to win.

hero.lead: Premium goalkeeper gear: match gloves, training gloves, junior gloves, matchwear, padded training kit and accessories — designed to look fast and feel elite on every pitch.

academy.title: Start here. Level up.
academy.text: Junior gloves, training comfort and parent-friendly bundles for young keepers.

match.title: Game day. Own it.
match.text: Match gloves, long-sleeve jerseys and team-ready kit for weekly football.

elite.title: No excuses. Just results.
elite.text: Padded protection, compression layers and premium accessories for high-intensity sessions.

featured.copy: Gloves built for grip, protection and confidence. Complete the kit with matchwear, training gear and accessories.

values.gripText: Maximum control from first touch to final save.
values.protectText: Built for dives, contact, turf and repetition.
values.performText: Fast, sharp, light and matchday confident.
values.focusText: Lock in, block out and own your box.

lab.title: Pick your save style.
lab.copy: Find the right fit for your level. Choose your keeper profile and we’ll match you to the perfect gear.

essentials.copy: Complete your keeper setup with padded protection, base layers, socks, bags and essential accessories.

kit.title: Build your keeper kit.
kit.copy: Build your perfect keeper kit. Mix and match gloves, matchwear and accessories to create a bundle that fits your game.

levels.title: Academy. Match. Elite.
levels.copy: Three clear levels make the range easy for parents, teams and serious keepers to understand.
levels.matchText: Match gloves, jerseys and team-ready kit.
levels.eliteText: Technical layers, pads and premium accessories.

club.copy: More than gear. A movement for young keepers who train different, dive harder and want to be the player everyone trusts when the match gets chaotic.
